subcodes.first_line: All the world awaited this blessed Day, and when from the effulgence of the rays of the Sun of Truth this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع عالم منتظر این یوم مبارک بودند و چون از پرتو انوار آفتاب حقیقت یوم
subcodes.subjects: @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @knowledge; recognition of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
